short_description: AI-powered product images for email & social — branded, instant, no design skills needed.
long_description:
**Stop losing sales to plain product photos.**

Customers scroll past generic images. MailCraft turns your Shopify product catalog into on-brand, professional marketing visuals in seconds — no Photoshop, no designer, no waiting.

## How It Works

1. **Connect your brand** — Upload your logo, pick your brand color, choose a font. Takes 2 minutes.
2. **Pick a template** — Choose from 8 professionally designed layouts (product card, sale announcement, new arrival, story format, and more).
3. **Generate & publish** — MailCraft removes the background, composites your product onto the template, and delivers a pixel-perfect image ready for email campaigns, social posts, and ads.

## Why Merchants Choose MailCraft

- **10× faster than hiring a designer** — Generate a full product catalog of branded images in under an hour.
- **Always on-brand** — Every image uses your exact colors, logo, and fonts. Zero inconsistency.
- **Built for Shopify** — Native App Bridge integration, billing through Shopify, and automatic product sync. Nothing to install outside Shopify.

## Pricing

- **Hobby** — Free, 100 images/month. Perfect for small catalogs.
- **Pro** — $29/month, 1,000 images/month. For growing brands.
- **Business** — $79/month, 10,000 images/month. For high-volume merchants.

All plans include background removal, branded compositing, and instant download.

app_icon_spec.description: Dark navy background (#0F172A) with envelope icon in brand indigo (#6366F1), bold 'MC' monogram overlay in white. Rounded corners 80px. Generated via Satori renderer.

screenshots.caption: Dashboard — at-a-glance stats, recent generations, and quick actions
Template editor — live brand preview with color, font, and logo customization
Products grid — status badges, generated thumbnails, bulk regenerate
Billing page — plan comparison, usage progress bar, upgrade flow
Onboarding wizard — 3-step setup: brand kit → template → confirm
Public status page — queue depth, p50/p95 generation time, uptime

scenes.description: Install flow: Shopify Partners listing → 'Add app' → OAuth redirect → permission screen
Brand kit setup: logo upload, color picker (#6366F1 indigo), font selector (Inter)
Template selection: grid of 8 templates, click 'Product Card', live preview populates with brand colors
First image generated: products grid shows 'pending' → spinner → 'success' badge → thumbnail visible
Download: click image → full-res preview → 'Download PNG' → file saved to desktop. End card: MailCraft logo + pricing CTA
